hotel_name: Khách sạn Lucasta Sài Gòn (Lucasta SaiGon Hotel)

reviews.title: New owners but old hotel
reviews.text: I have recently rebooked to stay here as last time I was here when it was still Thien Thao hotel the staff were amazing and hotel was very decent for its location but to my surprise when I checked in the service that once was has gone and the hotel has fallen apart during the COVID pandemic and the new owners haven’t bother to do any improvements except for changing the hotel name.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: It’s ok
reviews.positives: Location to the local markets and food
reviews.negatives: The wall is thin . You can hear everyone moving from above and on the side. If someone from a different room closes the door, you room would be affected.

reviews.title: Small
reviews.text: The room very small but around the hotel has a lot restau

reviews.title: Okayish.
reviews.positives:
Location was a nice wide street
Many rooms
Elavator
Clean Towel and beddings. 
Bathroom with bath tub
toiletries were good

No kitchen facility
No laundry
No Food
TV was old, not the smart TV
limited space

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
After booking the room, I wanted to extend my stay, so I emailed the hotel. They replied that when I arrive, I just need to tell the receptionist. However, when I arrived to check in, the receptionist said my room was no longer available for the following day, and only higher-priced options were left. If I wanted to stay at that lower rate, I should choose a cheaper place to stay, even though the room for one night costs 500,000 VND, which is not exactly cheap. 
The male staff member spoke with a very condescending attitude. I asked if I should go up to the room myself or if someone would lead me there, and he told me to go up myself. 
Overall, the staff was very unwelcoming. 
This was a very bad experience, and I probably will not return.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location was decent with few restaurants nearby. Convenient. Decent size rooms
reviews.negatives: Not used to that part of the city. We stayed there for a month. Return flight was late in the evening, hotel would not extend the courtesy of a few hours given that we atayed there for a month and charged a day worth.

reviews.title: Friendly Staff, ok location
reviews.text: Don’t get a room ending in 3 it is directly next to the elevator shaft, I was unable to sleep all night due to the elevator shaft whirring all night going up and down constantly. Outside of this the bed is two singles pushed together so crack if your in the middle. Staff are friendly, location easy taxi into town. Coffee shops nearby. Not a bad hotel just not great with the room i received
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: We stayed for 1 night only and booked 2 rooms. Both rooms airconditioning are not cold and it could be a technical problem but that's not an excuse. Rooms had smoking odour and management should do a pre check before letting it out to clients. Location is very convenient, staffs are ok but should be trained better in my opinion as these sorts of problems can be avoided.

reviews.negatives: At times it gets noisy at night but otherwise it’s an excellent stay for the price. The mattress is a little lumpy and hard for my taste but it’s not unbearable.

reviews.title: Lucasta hotel.
reviews.text: I paid for a Superior Queen room and requested two single beds. The hotel never responded to my request. Upon check-in, we were given a room on the 8th floor - the elevator only goes up to the 7th floor, so two elderly women had to walk up those stairs to get to their room! The night staff (***) said the hotel was fully booked so he couldn't move us to another room with twin beds. Apart from this oversight, we are happy with our stay.

reviews.title: room really small, old furniture and bathroom
reviews.text: there're 2 beds and that's it. no space for anything else. The furniture is old. They don't include the tax in the price. All these things that made the stay become unpleasant. Won't come back.

reviews.title: Would definitely stay again!
reviews.positives: Loved the location. We don’t like staying in the touristy areas, and this one felt more “local” than District 1. Shops and restaurants close. The rooms were clean and nicely decorated, staff very helpful.
reviews.negatives: Road noise, which is very normal in Vietnam. We asked to move from the 2nd floor after our first night, and they put us on the 5th floor which helped a lot. We were very thankful!

reviews.title: Far from trourist attraction

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The location is quite convenient, easy to explore the area (foods, mart, cinema...) - center of city, easy to go out. The facilities are adequate but it's suitable for you to go out all day & back to hotel for sleep only

reviews.title: Exceptional

Thank you for your service.

reviews.title: Worth  to stay
reviews.text: Located on very busy street with lots of restaurants and food vendors, even thought it's not close to downtown core. Nice and helpful staff. The rooms are little bit old and small but relatively clean. You cannot beat the price  when comparing with similar hotels in the area.  For those reasons, we stayed here so many times.

reviews.text: Nice staff, look after us well. Location is not so good as traffic is really bad and noisy. Probably won't go back.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: L'hôtel est quelque peu vétuste.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great location with friendly staff. A good place to stay where you can enjoy many kind of VNFoods around.  Should be better if the bathroom is cleaner

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Bon emplacement, il y a le marché local ban co à quelques pas et de nombreux restaurants variés ou de nombreux locaux viennent manger. Personnel réactif et à l'écoute. Chambre plus grande que la moyenne. Bonne puissance du jet de douche. Si vous recherchez un endroit avec un bon rapport qualité/ prix, je vous recommande cet hotel
reviews.negatives: les images sur booking sont un peu embellies. Le style de l'hôtel date. Seulement un échantillon de gel douche tous les jours

reviews.title: Good stay with room for improvement
reviews.text: Location is good with many foods nearby. It's nice if you want to explore foods here :) . Staff were friendly but could be more caring to customer & Cleanliness should be done carefully & regularly . Overall, it's a nice place with some areas need improvement

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement est très bien, rue avec beaucoup de commerces (restaurants, minimarket, cafés) et à 2km du centre, donc par cher en taxi Grab (entre 50 000 Đ et 75 000Đ selon horaires). Chambre petite mais confortable (bonne literie) et au calme de la rue.
Bon rapport qualité/prix et accepte la carte bleue Visa ! Je  recommande.
reviews.negatives: Il a fallu précisé à l'accueil que le nettoyage de la chambre se fasse tous les jours.

reviews.title: OK location and clean restroom
reviews.text: The hotel was fine but the restroom is really news on the top newly built room with small side windows . We love the room but elevator only go up to 7th floor and we have to walk up to the 8th floor

reviews.title: Très bien!
reviews.positives: Presque tout :)
reviews.negatives: Merci de retirer la mention « VISA » sur votre porte, au moment de payer nous n’avions pas de cash

reviews.title: Great overall
reviews.text: Lucasta hotel is a great place overall, however, they do need to invest in better towels in their bathrooms as they are very rough. The beds, like everywhere else in southeast Asia, are quite hard and you may find it a little hard to sleep. The AC in the bedrooms is not great but it does work ok. In other reviews that you may find on Google I would suggest you request one of the rooms with a view of the city and not a view of the gardens as those rooms tend to have slightly better AC functionality. Wifi is solid in the room we stayed in. I understand they want to save power when guests are not in the rooms but it would be nice if the AC stayed on while you are out so when you get back to your room it isn't super hot and sticky. Hope this review helps! Overall I would recommend a stay here.

reviews.title: Sehr freundliche
reviews.positives: Das Personal war hervorragend und sehr bemüht, trotz fehlender Englischkenntnisse.
reviews.negatives: Wir hatten ein Zimmer für 3 Personen. Ein Doppelbett und ein Schlafsofa. Das Schlafsofa war aber leider viel zu knapp für die dort schlafende Person. Also für Personen über 1,75 ist das Schlafsofa leider nichts.

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: location was good, alot of food just outside.  staff was good.  facilities pretty basic.  room clean enough.  they do charge for parking and car did get scratched during that time.  towels are hard but the toothbursh kit was the best quality i have ever seen.

reviews.title: Need more in depth cleaning
reviews.text: Location was perfect but bathroom ceiling looks really old compared to the room itself. The carpet need to be clean more thoroughly especially the corners is all dusty . Carpet doesn’t feel cleaned often so not comfortable walking barefoot on it.   I would stay again for the location but would definitely go into check the rooms before booking .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
August 2025.  I stayed at this hotel a fews night during my August trip to VN. 
Simple hotel, no breakfast, gym, pool or free laundry if staying more than 4 - 5 nights . 
Just a nice quiet place to rest after a long day venture around town. It’s surrounded by many restaurants. And like 10 minutes ride to Ben Thanh market.
I might stay here again next time am in this side of town.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
07/28/2025 to 08/01/2025 I’m a male solo traveler with an ez going attitude when staying at hotels in Viet Nam. 
Despite a 2 stars rating hotel with no continental breakfast i think this hotel lives up to my bare minimum standards. 
Room are a little downgrade, bathroom is small, definitely not going to fit foreigners medium built body. Majority of people staying here are Vietnamese national. 
Location is within 20 minutes walk to Ben Thanh market. Surrounded by a lot of local restaurants. However, it’s quiet at night. You’ll get your sleep after a long day out and bout. 

The only reason i stay here during this trip to VN is the location close to my relative.
 Overall, I don’t mind staying here again next time am in SaiGon. 

PS: don’t ask for much when you are staying at a 1-2 star hotels in VietNam  and expect for the worst conditions.

reviews.title: Great Location !!!
reviews.text:
Pros: Great location. Nice restaurants, noodles shops, coffee shops, laundromats and mini mart nearby. 5 to 10 min Grab ride to a big shopping mall. Strong WiFi.
Friendly and helpful staff.

Cons: Room on the hotel front side may be noisy for those who like quite room due to the non-stop traffic. 
TV channels are lagging if the kids like to watch the cartoon channels.

reviews.title: That's good! (*^_^*)
reviews.text:
Traveling solo as a man for a 2-week stay.  
The room is equipped with WiFi, a refrigerator, and an electric kettle. That's enough.  
The outlets are compatible with the Japanese shape (although 200V).  
However, the elevator only goes up to the 7th floor, so I had to take the stairs from the 7th to the 8th floor (•ᴗ•; ).  
However, there was a microwave in the back of the reception area that I could use, which was very appreciated!  
The staff were all very friendly.

reviews.title: Smooth stay with friendly staff and clean, spacious room
reviews.text:
I had a pleasant stay at this hotel in Ho Chi Minh City. Everything went smoothly from check-in to check-out. I arrived very late, almost 12 midnight, due to a delayed flight from Phu Quoc, but the concierge staff was still very accommodating and welcoming, which I really appreciated.

The room was clean, spacious, and smelled fresh. Amenities were mostly complete — slippers, hair dryer, snacks, and toiletries were provided. Shampoo and conditioner were not available, but overall the room was comfortable and well maintained.

The hotel is located in District 3, very close to the city center, with easy access to District 1 and major attractions.

One small downside is that my room was on the 1st floor, and I could hear some noise when the elevator opened from the ground floor, as well as footsteps from guests using the stairs. It wasn’t a major issue.

The staff speak and understand English well, making communication easy and stress-free. Overall, a good stay and great value, especially with the friendly service.

reviews.title: Good value for short stay

Hotel is somehow renovated, but is still old.
Bathroom is ok.
The reception and parking are is 24/7.
The room temperature is controlled by the main unit.
Mattress and pillow covers are changed daily.
reviews.negatives:
The overall hotel is quite old. The carpet in room makes it dirtier, the house keeping should use the vacuum machine to clean it rather than the normal wipes.
Towels are old, some towels even have a hold in it.
Room next the street is quite noisy.

reviews.title: Best cost-performance compared to its price!
reviews.text: The Ben Thanh Market and the Presidential Palace are closer than expected, within about 2 km of each other. The hotel costs are also relatively cheap, around 20,000 won per night, with bathtubs available, making it much cheaper compared to other hotels. The staff is also friendly. Good!

Cleaning staff are like a well oiled machine, they get the job done very well, and get the room back into top shape quick as! Location is very good. Restaurant, cheap as chips straight across the road, 7am -11pm 7 days. Super market, stones throw, massage places stones throw, shopping mall and big ass super market 5 minute scooter ride, restaurants, clothes etc, worth the stay here, like being at home really, very easy going and accommodating. Noise is only only for the front rooms, as I am a very light sleeper, but all in all, very happy.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: A hotel right in the center of Ho Chi Minh City, with good land prices for a hotel in such a central location, looks quite new on the outside, and the reception staff is very charming. The interior of the room is quite vintage, reminiscent of interior decoration styles from the 90s.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I like everything. The staffs are great and accommodating..

reviews.title: Clean and they have toilet paper!!!
reviews.text:
Honestly, the facility was clean. The air conditioning was crisp. You definitely want to get a room with a window. House keeping available every day. My biggest perk was they have toilet paper. If you’ve never been to Vietnam, you need to know that the majority of your bathrooms just come with a handheld shower handle  to clean your bottom.This hotel had some western amenities which was pleasant. It is in the center of most things and easy to get a grab or to get food. The staff was kind and really went above and beyond to communicate needs to you. My only small complaint was that the televisions in the rooms do not come in clear and you can’t make out anything that anybody is saying because of the static. I was in room 305 and 505 with a window view and my television was not able to be watched. However, that was OK because I didn’t come there to watch TV and I did most of my Netflix on my phone. For the price of the room which came to $25 USD a night you couldn’t beat the price. My son stayed in a room with no window and he paid $19 USD a night. My son did say that those rooms were a little bit stuffy and felt closed in so I highly suggest a window room. But for the money, you can’t beat it and it is much better than staying in an apartment that’s not approved by  management, which was our first attempt in Vietnam and that was horrible and that was a person advertising on Agoda that never cleared the apartment with their apartment complex. We were almost thrown out the first night we were there because the apartment was supposed to be registered with their ward and it wasn’t. My advice ,Stay in a hotel, best bet and  this hotel met every expectation.  
On my next trip ,it’s this hotel 100% all the way in Saigon District 3.

reviews.title: Vacances au Vietnam
reviews.text: Satisfaisant dans l'ensemble de cet hôtel . Bon rapport - qualité prix ,bien situé dans un bon quartier avec divers commerces bars , restaurants et autres  , tout le personnel de l’accueil très serviable souriant et professionnel . Chambre propre ,calme , avec lit et oreillers confortables . À recommander sans hésitation

reviews.title: Bien , satisfait, bien emplacement.
reviews.text: Je suis content de passer ses journées dans cet hôtel, bien agréable. Merci.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Bequeme Betten , sauberes Zimmer , guter Service , aber kleines Fenster ohne Blick

reviews.title: 設備非常に悪い。
reviews.text: 9泊予定していたが、残りの2泊は捨てて違うホテルに移動した。

reviews.title: 泊まるだけなら問題ない
reviews.text: あえて３区に宿泊する方もいないかと思いますが、普通のホテルです。私の部屋は冷蔵庫が壊れてました。

reviews.title: さっぱりしてます。
reviews.text: 又ヴェトナムに行く時には利用したいです。

reviews.text:

今後ともよろしくお願いいたします

reviews.title: スタッフ最高
reviews.text: スタッフが良い。

reviews.title: 다신 안감
reviews.text: 아고다에  시티뷰.가든뷰.사기임. 시티뷰 예약하고깄는데 창문없고 엘베 안가는8 층 주려했다.아고다예약한거 베트남언어로 바꿔 보여주고 이방저방 2박동안 방 옮겨가며 좁고 벽뷰방 숙박했다.아고다 잘못인가 숙소가 사기인가 머르겠다. 3군 길 엄청 막힌다.공항.기차역 가까워 3군 했다가 공항에서 1시간 넘게 걸려 갔으며 호텔주변엔 뭐가 별로 없다

reviews.title: 싼맛에
reviews.text: 돈아끼는게 중요하다면 나쁘진 않다봅니다

reviews.title: 가격대비 괜찮아요
reviews.text: 위치도 좋고... 다만 개미와 바퀴벌레가 나와서 직접 약 사다 박멸했어요~

reviews.title: Rất tệ
reviews.text: Phòng rất ồn, tất cả âm thanh: tiếng xả bồn cầu của phòng trên, tiếng lễ tân tám điện thoại, tiếng khách khác tám ngoài hành lang, tiếng va chạm nhẹ bên ngoài đều rõ mồn một. Cả đêm không thể nào ngủ được.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Lừa đảo mất tiền…

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Khách sạn không cách âm, siêu ồn, tầng trên mà bước đi là ở dưới nghe đùng đùng, ở ngoài nói chuyện là trong phòng nghe không sót chữ nào
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Cho 1 sao cái tội đưa lên tầng 8 ám ảnh. Tưởng tượng khuya mà phải vác 2 cái va li đi thang bộ nó bực cỡ  nào vì thang máy không lên được tầng 8. Tầng 8 chỉ dành cho khách thuê giờ chứ không ở nguyên đêm.

Lễ tân nam thì rất dễ thương, còn lễ tân nữ cái mặt đã thấy ghét còn bonus thêm nói chuyện với khách cứ cắm mặt vào điện thoại suốt, kể cả khi vào thang máy, rất mất lịch sự.

Hôm nay mình tính đặt lại. Lễ tân báo có thể sẽ sắp mình ở tầng 8 ám ảnh đó nữa nên thôi, tặng cho khách sạn 1 sao vậy. Sao bán hàng mà không chịu hiểu cảm xúc của khách vậy. Ám ảnh tầng 8 vcđ. Đặt trước mà vẫn sắp tầng 8 thì cho con gửi 1 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏kèm 1 sao đánh giá.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Dơ

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nói chung thì phòng k có gì đặc sắc. Ở thôi thì ok, trông đợi vào dịch vụ thì k nên. Mọi thứ quá tầm thường so với giá. Phòng ẩm, cảm giác ẩm ướt trên nền phải đi dép liên tục.

reviews.title: Phòng cũ
reviews.text: Phòng cũ tường bong tróc

reviews.title: Khách sạn ồn không cách âm
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch tiện nghi gần trung tâm nhưng sáng rất ồn, ồn từ khách ra vào đên nhân viên dọn dẹp kê giường quét dọn. Mọi người tranh nhau nói từ 7g sáng đến trưa.

Khách sạn cũ. Không mới như hình ảnh trên app

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Khâu vệ sinh rất kém , phòng ẩm mốc , tủ treo áo quần ẩm thấp , rất ít móc treo áo quần . Nắp bồn cầu lỏng lẻo , diện tích phòng rất chật chội 
Tóm tắt là không OK

reviews.title: Ổn
reviews.text: Ổn

reviews.title: Địa điểm thuận tiện
reviews.text:
Khách sạn Lucasta có địa điểm thuận tiện cho ăn uống, đi lại. Gần khách sạn có cháo cá rau đắng rất ngon. 
Tuy nhiên, nhân viên lễ tân (nam) thiếu thân thiện. Điểm trừ của khách sạn là phòng sát nhau nên rất ồn. Còn lại mọi thứ hầu như là ổn

reviews.text: Phòng cũ

reviews.title: 10 điểm cho hoàn tiền nhanh chóng
reviews.text: Mình có đặt 2 đêm tháng 12 và thanh toán xong. Nhưng sau đó mình xin hủy để đặt Agoda vì giá rẻ hơn. Bên khách sạn vui vẻ hỗ trợ hoàn tiền. Cho 10 điểm.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom

reviews.title: Khách sạn có đầy đủ các tiện ích cơ bản
reviews.text: Khách sạn này có 1 mức giá khá tốt ở vị trí này. Có chỗ để xe máy, ô tô thì hạn chế hơn, gần các địa điểm du lịch, ăn uống. Tuy nhiên, khách sạn cần nâng cấp hệ thống nước nóng và một vài bóng đèn trong phòng

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.text: Mấy ngày đầu tôi cảm thấy không thực sự hài lòng vì được xếp phòng ở tầng 8 (thang máy chỉ đến tầng 7). Tủ lạnh và máy điều hoà thường xuyên bị trục trặc. Tuy nhiên, mấy ngày sau đó KS đã sắp xếp cho tôi chuyển xuống tầng 1. Điều này cho thấy KS đã cố gắng hỗ trợ khách.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double AC Room with Ensuite Bathroom
